sections.heading: CNC Machining Phenolic (PF) Plastic Parts
sections.text: CNC Machining Phenolic (PF) Plastic Parts Custom fast CNC machining phenolic plastic parts manufactured by Junying. Phenolic plastic (PF) is a hard, dense thermosetting industrial laminated plastic with high strength and toughness, good resistance to solvents and high temperatures, excellent dielectric strength, wear and corrosion resistance, good machinability, low moisture absorption, light weight, mechanical strength and dimensional stability. It made by the impregnation of layers of a substrate with resin, as the diversity of substrate materials, final created materials are versatile to used in varying applications. Phenolic plastics can be machined, turned, milled, drilled, punched, sa...
